componentDescription: DropdownInput combines a text input with an integrated dropdown selector for the input's prefix or context. Use it when the input field's meaning changes based on a dropdown selection — e.g., a phone number input where the country code dropdown changes the format, or a search input where the category dropdown changes the search scope.
features: Text input paired with dropdown selector
Placeholder for both input and dropdown

usageExamples.title: Phone number with country code
usageExamples.description: Phone input with integrated country code dropdown.
usageExamples.code:
<DropdownInput
  label="Phone number"
  value={phoneNumber}
  onChange={setPhoneNumber}
  options={countryCodes.map(c => ({ label: `${c.flag} ${c.dialCode}`, value: c.dialCode }))}
  placeholder="Enter phone number"
  size={TextInputSize.MEDIUM}
  error={!!phoneError}
  errorMessage={phoneError}
/>

usageExamples.title: Scoped search input
usageExamples.description: Search with category selector to scope the query.
usageExamples.code:
<DropdownInput
  label="Search"
  value={query}
  onChange={setQuery}
  options={[
    { label: 'All', value: 'all' },
    { label: 'Users', value: 'users' },
    { label: 'Orders', value: 'orders' },
    { label: 'Products', value: 'products' },
  ]}
  placeholder="Search..."
  size={TextInputSize.MEDIUM}
/>

value.llmContext: Required. The text input's current value. Manage with useState. This is the text portion — the dropdown selection is managed separately.

onChange.llmContext: Required. Called with new string value as user types in the text input.
onChange.propDescription: Required. Called with new string value on text input change

options.llmContext: Required. Array of dropdown options. Each option: { label: string, value: string }. These populate the integrated dropdown selector. The currently selected option is typically displayed as a prefix or suffix to the input.
options.propDescription: Required. Array of dropdown options for the selector

error.llmContext: Set to true for validation errors. Show an errorMessage explaining the issue. Common errors: phone number format doesn't match selected country code, invalid characters.
error.propDescription: Shows error styling on the input
